/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/Init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/app/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/renderer/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/renderer/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/renderer/objects/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/renderer/objects/ArrayObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/renderer/objects/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/renderer/objects/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/renderer/objects/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GLEngine.dir/src/input/Input.cpp.o -o GLEngine  libglad.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
